nodes.title: Best Practices
widgets_values:
Composition:
    framing angle
    front view
    45 degree angle
    left side half face
    profile view
    over the shoulder
    close up
    medium shot
    full body shot
    wide shot
    low angle
    high angle
    eye level
    centered composition
    rule of thirds
    symmetrical framing

Lighting:
    soft diffused daylight
    cinematic warm key light
    cool ambient light
    glowing orange sunset
    golden hour light
    blue hour light
    high contrast noir lighting
    dramatic side lighting
    studio portrait lighting
    rim lighting
    backlighting
    split lighting
    top down spotlight
    soft window light
    overcast natural light
    volumetric light rays
    moody low key lighting
    bright high key lighting

Character / Subject:
    detailed facial features
    expressive eyes
    natural skin texture
    confident posture
    relaxed pose
    dynamic movement
    candid expression
    subtle smile
    intense gaze
    looking away
    facing camera

Multiple Characters Examples:
    two young women standing side by side, left woman with long brown hair wearing a white summer dress, right woman with short black hair wearing a leather jacket, soft diffused daylight, shallow depth of field
    two business partners facing each other across a desk, man on left in dark suit, woman on right in beige blazer, serious expressions, cinematic warm key light, modern office background
    three friends sitting at a cafe table, center person laughing, left friend holding coffee cup, right friend leaning forward, casual streetwear, natural window light
    couple embracing at sunset on the beach, tall man in white linen shirt, woman with long red dress resting her head on his shoulder, glowing orange sunset, soft backlighting
    

Clothing and Color Palette:
    white oversized hoodie
    tailored black suit
    casual streetwear
    flowing summer dress
    textured fabric
    layered outfit
    minimalistic wardrobe
    bold color accents
    warm color palette
    cool color palette
    muted tones
    pastel tones
    monochrome styling
    complementary colors

Environment:
    minimal interior background
    modern studio space
    urban city street
    cozy living room
    industrial warehouse
    natural forest setting
    beach at sunset
    mountain landscape
    blurred background
    clean white backdrop

Mood / Atmosphere:
    cinematic mood
    dreamy atmosphere
    dramatic tone
    soft romantic feel
    energetic vibe
    calm and peaceful
    mysterious ambiance
    nostalgic feeling
    futuristic aesthetic
    editorial style

Camera Details:
    Camera Type:
        DSLR camera
        mirrorless camera
        medium format camera
        full frame sensor camera
        APS C sensor camera
        35mm film camera
        Canon EOS R5
        Sony A7R V
        Nikon Z8
    Lens Type:
        24mm wide angle lens
        35mm lens
        50mm prime lens
        85mm portrait lens
        135mm telephoto lens
        70 to 200mm zoom lens
        macro lens
        tilt shift lens
        f1.4 aperture
        f1.8 aperture
        f2.8 aperture
        shallow depth of field
        natural bokeh
        cinematic depth of field

Prompt Structure:
    subject description first
    second character description if needed
    environment context
    lighting style
    mood atmosphere
    camera and lens details
    framing and angle

Technical / Settings:
    simple prompt wording
    short clear prompt
    avoid complex descriptions
    moderate CFG scale
    refine and upscale afterward
